rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the amended petition still did not disclose Administrator's actions taken under his IAEA authority, as required by CRC 7.250(a) and 7.550(b), Administrator claims that assets on hand as of 5/16/25 have the same value as on 11/6/23, and all cash has apparently NOT been maintained in interest-bearing accounts, as the net distributable amounts are based on the date of death value of the mutual fund. The verification of the amended petition also did not refer to the amended petition, just to "foregoing Petition."

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF PETER H. PANG AND LINDA Y. PANG REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST ORIGINALLY RECORDED: JANUARY 2, 2008 AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions, Accounting, Distribution Of Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Surcharge, And Modification Of Trust Terms (Probate Code 172
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/11/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) All petitions involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries. [CRC 7.902.] (2) The only correct form of notice for a trust petition is the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120. (3) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) Notice must be served by a disinterested party, not by the petitioner. (5) If notice is served electronically, the party entitled to notice must affirmatively consent. [CRC 2.251(b).] (6) The petition does not disclose who the neutral successor trustee should be. Such person must consent to serve. (7) The 2014 amended and restated trust refers to a trust "originally dated January 2, 2008," but the original trust appears to have been signed 12/19/07. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 4/27/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF The MOMENT LEGACY TRUST(JJM) DATED 12/18/2012, AS Amended TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Jason Moment’S Petition For: 1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duties And Surcharge; 2)Suspension And Removal Of Trustee; 3) Prohibit Use Of Trust Funds
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/20/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) Please clarify whether a guardian ad litem has been contemplated to represent the minors. 2) The instant petition claims that venue is proper in San Francisco because it is the principal place of administration of the trust. The trustee lives in Illinois. Please clarify how administration takes place in San Francisco. 3) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court. Any party lodging a proposed order in a contested matter must file proof of service of the proposed order on all parties entitled to notice of the petition (LRSF 14.7.A.4). 4) All notices must include the instructions for remote appearances (LRSF 14.1.C.6). Please address the above issues and delivery courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 05/04/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VALARIE PHYLLIS CLEMENT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/13/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) Petition is incomplete. In Item 5a, box (7) or (8) must be checked. 2) All persons mentioned in decedent's will must be listed in Item 8 of the petition, including successor executors. 3) If a will names a trust or trustee as a devisee, the trustee must be clearly identified in item 8. Where the personal representative and the sole trustee are the same person, or if there is no trustee, the beneficiaries of the trust must be clearly identified (Probate Code Section 1208(b) and LRSF 14.18.C.2). 4) No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Form DE-147S) has been filed (San Francisco Local Rule 14.18.E). 5) Petitioner's phone number is missing form the Duties and Liabilities. Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 05/04/2026 to avoid additional continuance.
